Who I Am

Taslim
Ansari

Thumbnail Designer

I don't design thumbnails.
I engineer clicks.

Your video could be the best thing on the internet. Nobody will know — if the thumbnail doesn't stop them first.

That's not design. That's psychology with a color palette.

You make the content.
I make sure it gets watched.

How It Works

My Design
Process

1.
Brief

You share the Script, Rough Idea or Full Video if ready. I decode the message, the mood, and what the video actually needs to say.

2.
Research

I study your niche and audience psychology — then map out 3–5 concept sketches.

3.
Design

Strategy meets visuals. Every element placed with one goal: stop the scroll, earn the click.

4.
Refine

Your feedback sharpens it with unlimited revisions. We push until you hit that "that's the one" feeling.

My Services

01 ◆
Thumbnail Design

Every element — the expression, the contrast, the text placement — is placed with one purpose: to make the click feel inevitable. Not decorative. Not random. Intentional down to the pixel.

02 ◆
Title Suggestion

A great thumbnail with a weak title is a missed click. I'll suggest high-performing titles that work as a system — not an afterthought.
